orthography2ipa вҖ” language data explorer

Every registered orthography вҶ’ IPA spec, with its cited academic sources, in one browsable page.
production вҖ” full coverage, regression-tested, cited sources research вҖ” validated against published phonology; positional rules present skeleton вҖ” auto-generated graphemes/allophones, unvalidated stub вҖ” code + name + family + script only
Gold benchmark data is a grain of salt вҖ” PER is directional, not a certification. See docs/benchmarks.md and docs/scoreboard.md.

    Select a language from the list.

    Genetic descent from each spec's parent. Dashed rings are ancestry groupings (proto-languages, medieval stages) with no gold of their own. Click a name to open it.
